active_work.text: Draft PR #489 is clean and green at 03fdda1; it remains partial and not release-ready.
Main R-CMD-check 27720099917 and pkgdown 27720668325 completed successfully at 0567cd7.

Run 27722546237 completed successfully and pushed 5969f6f to power-pilot-results. Scored remote store is 19776 / 480000 reps with 1/48 cells at cap, pass94 3/24, pass95 0/24, 28 flagged cells, and 27 coverage anomalies. Local pilot is at 376010 / 480000 reps; scheduled run 27735802023 completed cancelled after shard success because persist and summary hit the 20-minute job limit. Fisher/Curie scoring still blocks coverage or power promotion.

#95 is merged and main CI is green; #101 is draft/clean on main, local merge-ref bridge slice passed 641/641, and local live JuliaCall bridge suite passed, but PR checks are still stale after retarget. CI.yml has no workflow_dispatch, so fresh CI needs maintainer-approved branch/PR-event mutation or deferral; #94 remains dirty salvage.
